attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
STG.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME,
STG.CREATION_DATE,                
STG.CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,              
STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE,             
STG.ETL_PROCESS_DTM,  
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,          
STG.GLOBAL_NAME,           
STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,          
STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG,
STG.OTM_TERR_ID,                   
STG.OTM_TERR_NAME,                 
STG.OTM_TERR_TYPE_CODE,
STG.REBOK_CHANNEL_FLAG,         
STG.SALESREP_NUMBER,        
STG.SC_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CODE,
STG.SC_LAST_UPD_DATE,
STG.SC_REASON_CODE,      
STG.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT,              
STG.SC_TYPE_CODE,
STG.SC_UNALLOCATED,                
STG.SC_USAGE_CODE,                 
STG.SHR_NODE_ID,                  
STG.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE,          
STG.TRX_SC_ID,                     
STG.USER_NAME,
STG.UCRM_CASE_NUM  /* ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY17 AUG CDR*/               
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_OTM_SLS_CRDTS_NAPLD STG
WHERE NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_SCA_NON_APLD_TRX_OVERLAY WK
 WHERE WK.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT = STG.TRX_SC_ID)
AND STG.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('CX','MS','CCR','WWP','DR')

SELECT
EX.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME,
EX.CREATION_DATE ,                
EX.CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
EX.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE,             
EX.ETL_PROCESS_DTM ,            
EX.GLOBAL_NAME    ,           
EX.LAST_UPDATE_DATE  ,          
EX.LATEST_SC_FLAG  ,
EX.OTM_TERR_ID,                   
EX.OTM_TERR_NAME,                 
EX.OTM_TERR_TYPE_CODE,            
EX.REBOK_CHANNEL_FLAG,         
EX.SALESREP_NUMBER,              
EX.SC_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CODE   ,
EX.SC_LAST_UPD_DATE,
EX.SC_REASON_CODE,    
EX.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT ,             
EX.SC_TYPE_CODE ,
EX.SC_UNALLOCATED,                
EX.SC_USAGE_CODE,
EX.SHR_NODE_ID ,                  
EX.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE,           
EX.TRX_SC_ID ,                    
EX.USER_NAME,
EX.UCRM_CASE_NUM  /* ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY17 AUG CDR*/         
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OTM_SLS_CRDTS_NAPLD EX 
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_SLS_CRDTS_NAPLD STG
WHERE STG.TRX_SC_ID = EX.TRX_SC_ID
)AND EX.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('CX','MS','CCR','WWP')

SELECT
STG.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE   AS  BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER  EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER  EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 (CASE
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='N' AND STG.CREATION_DATE<>STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE THEN COALESCE((STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE- INTERVAL '1' SECOND),CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='N' AND STG.CREATION_DATE=STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE THEN COALESCE(STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='Y' AND STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE='DEBIT' THEN COALESCE((STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE- INTERVAL '1' SECOND),CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='Y' THEN CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0) )
END) END_TV_DTM,
NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY    AS PD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
STG.SC_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CODE  AS PD_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CD,
NSCT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE    AS  PD_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
NEU.ERP_USER_NAME AS PD_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
(STG.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT*100)   AS   PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,  
NESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER AS PD_SALES_REP_NUM,  
NSTT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY    AS  PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
STG.CREATION_DATE  AS PD_SCAN_CREATION_DT,
CASE 
WHEN STG.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO' THEN 'QTC'
WHEN STG.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BO' THEN 'BV'
END AS PD_SS_CD,
SM.SALES_CR_ASSGN_NONAPPLD_KEY AS SALES_CR_ASSGN_NONAPPLD_KEY,
STG.TRX_SC_ID   AS  SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT,
STG.CREATION_DATE  AS  START_TV_DTM,
 STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG AS ACTION_CODE,
  CASE
 WHEN STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE='CREDIT' THEN 'I'
 WHEN STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE='DEBIT' THEN 'U'
 END AS DML_TYPE,
NSCAR.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD AS BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD,
 STG.OTM_TERR_ID AS SRC_RPTD_RBK_OTM_TERR_ID_INT,  
 STG.OTM_TERR_NAME AS SRC_RPTD_RBK_OTM_TERR_NAME,    
 STG.OTM_TERR_TYPE_CODE AS SRC_RPTD_RBK_OTM_TERR_TYPE_CD, 
 STG.SC_USAGE_CODE AS PD_SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD,      
 STG.SC_UNALLOCATED AS PD_SLS_CREDIT_UNALLOCATED_FLG,
STG.SC_LAST_UPD_DATE  AS PD_SLS_CREDIT_LAST_UPDATE_DTM, 
STG.UCRM_CASE_NUM,  /* ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY17 AUG CDR*/
 CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER) AS SPLIT_1_BU_KEY,
 CAST(-999 AS BIGINT) AS TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID
 FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_OTM_SLS_CRDTS_NAPLD STG
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SCA_NON_APLD_TRX_OVERLAY SM
 ON SM.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT = STG.TRX_SC_ID
 AND SM.EP_TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID = CAST(-999 AS BIGINT)
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
 ON STG.CUST_TRX_LINE_ID=NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCT
ON STG.SC_TYPE_CODE=NSCT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
AND NSCT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER NEU
ON STG.USER_NAME=NEU.ERP_USER_NAME
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_SALES_REP_TV NESR
ON STG.SALESREP_NUMBER=CAST(CAST(COALESCE(NULLIF(NESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN'),-999) AS INTEGER) AS VARCHAR(30))
AND NESR.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV NSTT
ON STG.SHR_NODE_ID=NSTT.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
AND NSTT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_ASGNMNT_REASON NSCAR
ON
STG.SC_REASON_CODE=NSCAR.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD
WHERE STG.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('CX','MS','CCR','WWP','DR')


UNION ALL 

SELECT
STG.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE   AS  BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER  EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER  EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 (CASE
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='N' AND STG.CREATION_DATE<>STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE THEN COALESCE((STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE- INTERVAL '1' SECOND),CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='N' AND STG.CREATION_DATE=STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE THEN COALESCE(STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='Y' AND STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE='DEBIT' THEN COALESCE((STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE- INTERVAL '1' SECOND),CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='Y' THEN CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0) )
END) END_TV_DTM,
NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY    AS PD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
STG.SC_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CODE  AS PD_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CD,
NSCT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE    AS  PD_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
NEU.ERP_USER_NAME AS PD_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
(STG.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT*100)   AS   PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,  
NESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER AS PD_SALES_REP_NUM,  
NSTT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY    AS  PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
STG.CREATION_DATE  AS PD_SCAN_CREATION_DT,
CASE 
WHEN STG.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO' THEN 'QTC'
WHEN STG.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BO' THEN 'BV'
END AS PD_SS_CD,
SM.SALES_CR_ASSGN_NONAPPLD_KEY AS SALES_CR_ASSGN_NONAPPLD_KEY,
-999 AS SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT,
STG.CREATION_DATE  AS  START_TV_DTM,
 STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG AS ACTION_CODE,
  CASE
 WHEN STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE='CREDIT' THEN 'I'
 WHEN STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE='DEBIT' THEN 'U'
 END AS DML_TYPE,
NSCAR.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD AS BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD,
 STG.OTM_TERR_ID AS SRC_RPTD_RBK_OTM_TERR_ID_INT,  
 STG.OTM_TERR_NAME AS SRC_RPTD_RBK_OTM_TERR_NAME,    
 STG.OTM_TERR_TYPE_CODE AS SRC_RPTD_RBK_OTM_TERR_TYPE_CD, 
 STG.SC_USAGE_CODE AS PD_SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD,      
 STG.SC_UNALLOCATED AS PD_SLS_CREDIT_UNALLOCATED_FLG,
STG.SC_LAST_UPD_DATE  AS PD_SLS_CREDIT_LAST_UPDATE_DTM, 
STG.UCRM_CASE_NUM,
STG.SPLIT_1_BU_KEY, 
STG.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OTM_SCA_NAPLD_TRX_OLY_CX STG
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SCA_NON_APLD_TRX_OVERLAY SM
ON SM.EP_TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID = STG.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID
AND SM.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT = STG.TRX_SC_ID
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON STG.CUST_TRX_LINE_ID=NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCT
ON STG.SC_TYPE_CODE=NSCT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
AND NSCT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER NEU
ON STG.USER_NAME=NEU.ERP_USER_NAME
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_SALES_REP_TV NESR
ON STG.SALESREP_NUMBER=CAST(CAST(COALESCE(NULLIF(NESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN'),-999) AS INTEGER) AS VARCHAR(30))
AND NESR.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV NSTT
ON STG.SHR_NODE_ID=NSTT.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
AND NSTT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_ASGNMNT_REASON NSCAR
ON
STG.SC_REASON_CODE=NSCAR.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD
WHERE STG.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE IN ('CX','MS','CCR','WWP')

SELECT
 EX.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME,
 EX.CREATION_DATE ,                
 EX.CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
 EX.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE,             
 EX.ETL_PROCESS_DTM ,            
 EX.GLOBAL_NAME    ,           
 EX.LAST_UPDATE_DATE  ,          
 EX.LATEST_SC_FLAG  ,
 EX.OTM_TERR_ID,                   
 EX.OTM_TERR_NAME,                 
 EX.OTM_TERR_TYPE_CODE,            
 EX.REBOK_CHANNEL_FLAG,         
 EX.SALESREP_NUMBER,              
 EX.SC_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CODE   ,
 EX.SC_LAST_UPD_DATE,
 EX.SC_REASON_CODE,    
 EX.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT ,             
 EX.SC_TYPE_CODE ,
 EX.SC_UNALLOCATED,                
 EX.SC_USAGE_CODE,
 EX.SHR_NODE_ID ,                  
 EX.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE,           
 EX.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID ,                    
 EX.USER_NAME,
 EX.UCRM_CASE_NUM  ,         
 EX.SPLIT_1_BU_KEY      
 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OTM_SCA_NAPLD_TRX_OLY_CX EX 
 WHERE NOT EXISTS
 (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_SCA_NAPLD_TRX_OLY_CX STG
 WHERE EX.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID = STG.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID
)AND EX.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE IN ('CX','MS','CCR','WWP')

SELECT
 STG.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME,
 STG.CREATION_DATE,                
 STG.CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,              
 STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE,             
 STG.ETL_PROCESS_DTM,  
 'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,          
 STG.GLOBAL_NAME,           
 STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,          
 STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG,
 STG.OTM_TERR_ID,                   
 STG.OTM_TERR_NAME,                 
 STG.OTM_TERR_TYPE_CODE,
 STG.REBOK_CHANNEL_FLAG,         
 STG.SALESREP_NUMBER,        
 STG.SC_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CODE,
 STG.SC_LAST_UPD_DATE,
 STG.SC_REASON_CODE,      
 STG.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT,              
 STG.SC_TYPE_CODE,
 STG.SC_UNALLOCATED,                
 STG.SC_USAGE_CODE,                 
 STG.SHR_NODE_ID,                  
 STG.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE,          
 STG.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID,                     
 STG.USER_NAME,
 STG.UCRM_CASE_NUM ,        
 STG.SPLIT_1_BU_KEY                
 FROM  $$STGDB.ST_OTM_SCA_NAPLD_TRX_OLY_CX STG
 WHERE NOT EXISTS
 ( SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_SCA_NON_APLD_TRX_OVERLAY WK
  WHERE WK.EP_TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID = STG.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID)
 AND STG.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE IN ('CX','MS','CCR','WWP')
